# Copilot instructions for Project_MBML

This repository contains the final project for DTU course **42186 Model Based Machine Learning**.

## Project focus
- Analyze the smartphone addiction dataset:
  - https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/algozee/smartphone-addiction-prediction-data?resource=download

## Working conventions
- Keep changes focused and minimal.
- Prefer notebooks in `/notebooks` for exploration.
- Keep reusable code in `/src`.
- Keep data in `/data/raw` and `/data/processed`.
- Do not commit large dataset files to git.
